title: Add property tests for ferray-io, ferray-strings, ferray-ma, ferray-window, ferray-stride-tricks, ferray-autodiff

comments.author: phase-4-coordinator
comments.content: Adding proptest suites for the 6 crates without them: ferray-io, ferray-strings, ferray-ma, ferray-window, ferray-stride-tricks, ferray-autodiff. Skipping ferray-numpy-interop since it requires a Python runtime. Each suite will use ProptestConfig::with_cases(256) per project convention.

comments.author: phase-4-coordinator
comments.content: All 6 property test suites written and passing: ferray-io (12), ferray-strings (12), ferray-ma (12), ferray-window (12), ferray-stride-tricks (12), ferray-autodiff (15). Total: 75 new proptest functions. Version bumped 0.2.1 → 0.2.2.
